experiments.name: Low-tuning continual learning on realistic domain shift (split TinyImageNet)
experiments.notes: Auto-generated manifest for autonomous run. Spec description: CIFAR10/100 are relatively homogeneous. TinyImageNet introduces realistic domain complexity and naturally larger task distribution shifts. Current results only validate on toy benchmarks. This is the critical test of whether low-tuning generalizes to production-grade difficulty before attempting multi-domain splits.

purpose: Autonomously generated manifest for experiment 'harder_domain_split_tinyimagenet' (Low-tuning continual learning on realistic domain shift (split TinyImageNet)). Project: harder_domain_split_tinyimagenet-tinyimagenet-v1. Dataset: split_tinyimagenet, method: tcl, seeds: [42, 0, 1, 2, 3].
